title: Eritrichium chorisianum
taxonomy: Eritrichium chorisianum is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It belongs to the genus Eritrichium, which is a group of plants found primarily in the Northern Hemisphere. The plant is further classified within the subfamily Boraginoideae. Eritrichium chorisianum is native to the Arctic tundra and mountainous regions of Alaska and Siberia. It is a perennial herb with small blue flowers and has adapted to the harsh conditions of its native habitats.
